# CANDIDATE: V14E_BEAR_HIGH_CONF_VIX_MODERATE_FAST_TRACK

**Filed:** 2026-05-24  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** watcher_proposal  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Collecting 100 new bear-only V14E observations with confidence=high and VIX_MODERATE (15-20) will validate the fast-track promotion path for the V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE watcher, as historical data shows this subset has a win rate of ~87.5% (deduped) and 95.8% raw, significantly above the 55% promotion gate. This subset represents the core discriminator for the bear-only V14E edge.

## Mechanism

A dedicated script will monitor the V14E enhanced watcher for bear-only signals with `confidence=high` and `VIX_MODERATE` (15 ≤ VIX ≤ 20). Each qualifying observation is logged to a temporary JSONL file with timestamp, signal details, and outcome (win/loss). After every 10 observations, the running win rate is computed and logged. Collection stops at 100 observations. The script does not place trades; it is observation-only.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** N/A - observation-only data collection, no trades executed.
2. **Sample bias:** Targeting bear-only V14E observations with confidence=high and VIX_MODERATE (15-20). This is a biased subset of all V14E bear observations (historically N=33 raw, WR=84.8%). Selection method: real-time filtering on confidence and VIX regime. Overfit risk: subset selected based on historical performance; may not persist if market regime shifts.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (collected data will be OOS relative to historical data used to form hypothesis, which is up to 2026-05-21).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (observation-only, no trades executed).
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Win rate in collected sample falls below 55%, failing to validate fast-track path.
   - Insufficient VIX_MODERATE regime occurrence, preventing collection of 100 observations in reasonable time.
   - Regime shift causing VIX_MODERATE subset to lose its historical edge.
6. **Concentration:** To be determined post-collection. Historical deduped high-conf VIX_MODERATE subset showed top-2 dates (5/04, 5/15) represented 59.8% of raw P&L but reduced significantly after deduping to 1 obs/date.

## Pre-merge gate

gym validators for watcher logic, successful collection of 100 new bear-only V14E observations with confidence=high and VIX_MODERATE (15-20), running win rate ≥55% after 100 observations.

## Confidence

9 / 10 -- based on historical performance of this subset (raw WR=95.8%, deduped WR=87.5%) and strong confluence requirements (level_rejection + confluence as core base).

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements [V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE](2026-05-21-v14e-quality-filter.md) (#3 on leaderboard) by providing data to satisfy its promotion gate (WR≥55% over N≥100 new bear-only observations). No conflict with other candidates.
